changes.reason: The prior 45-second acceptance plus mild TP compression was flat and did not change the -655.2 call-wall tail. Moving to the next grid value requires a more persistent wall acceptance state before this tail-heavy profile can enter, without touching pullback/charm/squeeze throughput.
Keep the call-wall adaptive cap at the more conservative grid value so admitted trades do not default back to the wide convex target behavior that created the 120-minute recovery tail.

Compress the local fixed realization target from the previous 4.5 test to 3.5 to force earlier monetization in call-wall acceptance only; this is a stronger containment test after the 4.5 variant was essentially flat.
Raise the forward DEX confirmation from 0.05 to 0.08, the next grid step, to keep the profile focused on stronger dealer-forward support while avoiding broad option-profile tightening.

expected_effect: Should reduce call_wall_acceptance_long hold-time and hidden MAE risk by requiring more durable strike acceptance and earlier realization. Main tradeoff is losing or underpaying one of the two convex call-wall winners; reject unless total net profit stays within 2% of run_044 and worst/average MAE or exposure efficiency improves.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as a stronger profile-local containment test. The latest leader still has zero realized losses and no slow >=12h trades, but the global -655.2 MAE comes from call_wall_acceptance_long, which is only 2 trades yet 8.5% of PnL. The prior call-wall TP test at 45 seconds and 4.5 points was flat, so the next logical experiment is not broader vetoing but a more decisive call-wall-only persistence plus realization constraint.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long produced $640.5 on only 2 VALID_0DTE trades with $290/hour, but also the global -655.2 MAE and a 120-minute recovery path. Static broad filters would remove too much protected pullback/charm/squeeze edge.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Acceptance Persistence And Realization Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The worst tail is also the largest winner, so stronger acceptance and smaller targets may suppress net profit more than they improve hidden MAE.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance with positive forward DEX but wide selected target distance and extended ES-VWAP state.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Global worst MAE improves toward <= -513.4 or average MAE/exposure improves, call-wall PnL retention >=70%, total net profit >=98% of run_044, completed trades drop <=10%, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst call-wall trade had early favorable movement but did not reach full TP until after deep adverse excursion; config cannot directly observe early path failure.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a two-trade profile and cut rare convex winners unless protected winner retention is validated.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long enters with wide target or extended ES-VWAP and fails to make sustained early progress before adverse expansion.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below the current -655.2 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, and no new slow trades.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only long scalper regime. Realized losses are absent and slow >=12h trades are zero, so the true objective risk is hidden MAE and dela...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce global worst MAE from -655.2 toward <= -513.4, retain >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, slow_12h remains 0, and score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Split
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1241.8, 1DTE average/worst MAE improves, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL is measured, total net profit >=98%, and score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or lowers combined charm/pin worst MAE, total net profit >=98%, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, and no new slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Early-Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% pullback_long PnL, improve pullback worst MAE from -403.2, keep total PnL/hour flat or better, and slow_12h remains 0.
